info.title: ReleAF AI API
info.description: AI-powered sustainability and waste intelligence platform

post.description:
Main chat endpoint

Routes through orchestrator for intelligent workflow execution:
- Determines if vision analysis is needed
- Retrieves relevant knowledge from RAG
- Queries knowledge graph for relationships
- Searches for organizations if needed
- Generates final response with LLM

Simple chat endpoint (direct to LLM, no orchestration)

For basic questions that don't need vision/RAG/KG

Object detection only endpoint
Faster endpoint for just detecting objects without classification

Classification only endpoint

For classifying the whole image without object detection

Search for organizations near a location

Finds:
- Charities accepting donations
- Recycling centers
- Sustainability organizations
- Waste management facilities

get.description: Get list of materials that organizations might accept
